## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / scaffolding only

## Checklist

- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Updated affected component's `docs/components/<name>.md` if API changed
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests
- [ ] axe-core / e2e tests pass locally
- [ ] Bundle size impact is documented (or under-budget)
